# /tdd

> Same assembly pattern as `/fdd` but for the technical design — produces `projects/{p}/d365-ce/tdd.md` (domain-scoped per [ADR-0006](../../../design/adr/0006-doc-scope-domain-vs-feature.md)) by merging sub-platform technical packs (per [ADR-0005](../../../design/adr/0005-d365-ce-multi-file-sub-platform.md)).

## Usage

```
/tdd [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/plan.md` (gate `PLAN_CLARIFIED` APPROVED)
- `project.config.yaml` in-scope sub-platforms
- [templates/tdd/_index.template.md](../../templates/tdd/_index.template.md)
- [templates/tdd/model-driven.template.md](../../templates/tdd/model-driven.template.md), [canvas](../../templates/tdd/canvas.template.md), [power-pages](../../templates/tdd/power-pages.template.md), [pcf](../../templates/tdd/pcf.template.md), [power-automate](../../templates/tdd/power-automate.template.md)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/fdd.md` (cross-link; ensures TDD references FDD sections faithfully)

## Execution flow (assembly)

1. Resolve project; read in-scope sub-platforms.
2. Resolve target: `projects/{p}/d365-ce/tdd.md`. If absent, bootstrap from `templates/tdd/_index.template.md`.
3. For each in-scope sub-platform, merge its TDD pack into the `_index` shape.
4. For the current feature, append:
   - **Structural** sections per artifact type (plugin classes, JS modules, PCF controls, Canvas screens, Page templates, PA flow steps). Each carries `<!-- feature-id: {slug} -->`.
   - **Table-shaped** sections (object catalogue with object-id, dependencies, NFR target, test policy). Rows have `feature-id` column.
5. For each method / step / handler in §5 / §6 / §7, include **pseudocode** (per platform conventions ported into [constitution/01-model-driven-standards.md](../../constitution/01-model-driven-standards.md) and siblings).
6. **Inline self-check** against [templates/checklists/tdd-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/tdd-review.checklist.md). BLOCKERs fail the write.
7. Run `doc_lint` on the resulting TDD; BLOCKERs abort.
8. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `TDD_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/tdd.md` (extended in place; additive at section/row level)
- `.workflow.json` updated
